text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The autumn Tenno Sho is here. As Admire Vega
gets ready, I ask her if she's nervous.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Surprisingly, she says yes. Until this moment, she
cared about nothing but running for the sake of
her duty.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But now, there's much more on her mind, like her
own desire to win and her rivals. It seems all those
jumbled thoughts are what's making her anxious.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She makes off to where her rivals are waiting.
She'll face them, carrying her anxiety, her true
love for racing, and her earnest desire for victory.
